title: werauhia gladioliflora
intro: Werauhia gladioliflora, also known as the Sword Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of New Zealand, where it grows as an epiphyte or terrestrial plant. The medicinal properties of Werauhia gladioliflora are attributed to its high content of bromelain, an enzyme with anti-inflammatory and digestive aid properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially alleviating symptoms of arthritis, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
